'''moladhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sables|sables]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sables|sables]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| moladhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:moladhithi|moladhithi]] || [[word:moladhiji|moladhiji]] || [[word:moladhishi|moladhishi]] || [[word:moladhiki|moladhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moladhuthuthu|moladhuthuthu]] || [[word:moladhujuju|moladhujuju]] || [[word:moladhushushu|moladhushushu]] || [[word:moladhukuku|moladhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moladhuthu|moladhuthu]] || [[word:moladhuju|moladhuju]] || [[word:moladhushu|moladhushu]] || [[word:moladhuku|moladhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:moladhufthuf|moladhufthuf]] || [[word:moladhufjuf|moladhufjuf]] || [[word:moladhufshuf|moladhufshuf]] || [[word:moladhufkuf|moladhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:moladhethe|moladhethe]] || [[word:moladheje|moladheje]] || [[word:moladheshe|moladheshe]] || [[word:moladheke|moladheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:moladhothotho|moladhothotho]] || [[word:moladhojojo|moladhojojo]] || [[word:moladhoshosho|moladhoshosho]] || [[word:moladhokoko|moladhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:moladhotho|moladhotho]] || [[word:moladhojo|moladhojo]] || [[word:moladhosho|moladhosho]] || [[word:moladhoko|moladhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:moladhofthof|moladhofthof]] || [[word:moladhofjof|moladhofjof]] || [[word:moladhofshof|moladhofshof]] || [[word:moladhofkof|moladhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfthĂŻf|moladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfjĂŻf|moladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfshĂŻf|moladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfkĂŻf|moladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|moladhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|moladhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|moladhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|moladhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfthĂŻf|moladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfjĂŻf|moladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfshĂŻf|moladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfkĂŻf|moladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfthĂŻf|moladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfjĂŻf|moladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfshĂŻf|moladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moladhĂŻfkĂŻf|moladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:moladhĂŠthĂŠ|moladhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:moladhĂŠjĂŠ|moladhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:moladhĂŠshĂŠ|moladhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:moladhĂŠkĂŠ|moladhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:moladhathatha|moladhathatha]] || [[word:moladhajaja|moladhajaja]] || [[word:moladhashasha|moladhashasha]] || [[word:moladhakaka|moladhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:moladhatha|moladhatha]] || [[word:moladhaja|moladhaja]] || [[word:moladhasha|moladhasha]] || [[word:moladhaka|moladhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:moladhafthaf|moladhafthaf]] || [[word:moladhafjaf|moladhafjaf]] || [[word:moladhafshaf|moladhafshaf]] || [[word:moladhafkaf|moladhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:moladhasha|moladhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:moladhshĂ«sha|moladhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moladhrosha|moladhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moladhmusha|moladhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:moladhyasha|moladhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoladhnkshĂ«sha|gomoladhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoladhnkrosha|gomoladhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoladhnkmusha|gomoladhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoladhnkyasha|gomoladhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:molaladhasha|molaladhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molaladhshĂ«sha|molaladhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molaladhrosha|molaladhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molaladhmusha|molaladhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molaladhyasha|molaladhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolaladhnkshĂ«sha|gomolaladhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolaladhnkrosha|gomolaladhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolaladhnkmusha|gomolaladhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolaladhnkyasha|gomolaladhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:melĂŠdhasha|melĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:melĂŠdhshĂ«sha|melĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:melĂŠdhrosha|melĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:melĂŠdhmusha|melĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:melĂŠdhyasha|melĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomelĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gomelĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomelĂŠdhnkrosha|gomelĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomelĂŠdhnkmusha|gomelĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomelĂŠdhnkyasha|gomelĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:molfadhasha|molfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molfadhshĂ«sha|molfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molfadhrosha|molfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molfadhmusha|molfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molfadhyasha|molfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolfadhnkshĂ«sha|gomolfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolfadhnkrosha|gomolfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolfadhnkmusha|gomolfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolfadhnkyasha|gomolfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
